title: Structures Plus
body:
Do you want new _structures_ for your game?

Are you tired of _always_ having the same thing?

Then **_STRUCTURES PLUS_** is for You!

> With **10+ new** structures to explore and get loot!

## _(Current)_ Features
- 10 structures
- custom loot tables

## Q&A
- Can I add this mod to my modpack?

Sure!

- How many structures are planned?

At least 35

## Coming soon
- More structures
- Custom Items
- Features

Dependences
- None required

Notes
- Active development!
- Currently in Beta!
